condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.

open_items.text: Verify that recall record 4afcbccb-51ba-519f-a210-697885f1a36b is accessible and contains valid pilot configuration data needed to proceed with the live autonomy pilot.

recovered_action_object.response: Autonomy pilot seeded. I have identified one bounded follow-up item: confirm that the recall target record 4afcbccb-51ba-519f-a210-697885f1a36b is accessible and contains the expected pilot configuration data. This item is preserved as an open item and a single wake is scheduled to resolve it.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the bounded follow-up item by inspecting the pilot configuration recall record and confirming readiness to advance the autonomy pilot.
